access_key.description: Convex deployment access key. Used only for Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <access_key>); never logged.

deployment_url.description: URL of the Convex deployment to read from (e.g. https://my-deployment.convex.cloud).

table.description: Convex table name to read documents from (the 'documents' stream). Not used by the 'tables' stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
